chapter_title: Registration of Off-Highway Vehicles; Original and Renewal of Identification; Issuance of Certificates of Ownership
text: The provisions of Sections 4458, 4460, 4461, 4462, 4463, and 4464 shall be fully applicable to motor vehicles identified under this division and the terms “identification” and “identification certificate” shall have the same meaning as the terms “registration” and “registration card,” respectively, as used in those sections.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 16.5. OFF-HIGHWAY VEHICLES [38000 - 38604]
### Chapter 2. Registration of Off-Highway Vehicles; Original and Renewal of Identification; Issuance of Certificates of Ownership [38010 - 38265]
#### Article 3. Evidences of Identification [38070 - 38100]
##### § 38100

The provisions of Sections 4458, 4460, 4461, 4462, 4463, and 4464 shall be fully applicable to motor vehicles identified under this division and the terms “identification” and “identification certificate” shall have the same meaning as the terms “registration” and “registration card,” respectively, as used in those sections.

*(Amended by Stats. 1976, Ch. 1093.)*

subsections.text: The provisions of Sections 4458, 4460, 4461, 4462, 4463, and 4464 shall be fully applicable to motor vehicles identified under this division and the terms “identification” and “identification certificate” shall have the same meaning as the terms “registration” and “registration card,” respectively, as used in those sections.
